Notice Of Motion To Compel The Joinder Of 277 Columbus C1, Llc
Off Calendar Sep-02-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Lucey, 415.504.2165 of Tobner Ravenscroft LLP appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Maren Christensen.
Abram Peterson, 415.981.0550 of Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski LLP appearing via Zoom for Defendants Greentree Property Management Inc. and Veritas Investments, Inc.
Shadae Bell, 415.279.9400 of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP appaearing for Defendants ABC Commercial Realty and Tech Tov, LLC.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ABC COMMERICAL REALTY, TECH TOV, LLC Notice Of Motion To Compel The Joinder Of 277 Columbus C1, LLC is GRANTED. 277 Columbus shall be joined as a defendant in this action. Plaintiff may file an amendment to complaint/amended complaint or join 277 Columbus in any other manner permissible by law. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion Of Greentree Property Management, Inc. And Veritas Investments, Inc. For Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Sep-02-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Lucey, 415.504.2165 of Tobner Ravenscroft LLP appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Maren Christensen.
Abram Peterson, 415.981.0550 of Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski LLP appearing via Zoom for Defendants Greentree Property Management Inc. and Veritas Investments, Inc.
Shadae Bell, 415.279.9400 of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP appaearing for Defendants ABC Commercial Realty and Tech Tov, LLC.

Argued by Mr. Peterson. Mr. Peterson request that if the motion is granted that it will be granted without prejudice and that this is included in the order. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC., VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC. Motion Of Greentree Property Management, Inc. And Veritas Investments, Inc. For Good Faith Settlement is DENIED without prejudice. Insufficient information provided for the Court to make a determination of proportionate lability for plaintiff's alleged injury. As such, no determination may be made at this time as to the rough approximation of plaintiff's total recovery and the settlor's proportionate liability. The Court declines moving party's invitation to "consult[aion] with others" (Reply 2:18-19) to make this determination. The Court notes that it was not able to identify the font and style of the opposition papers; and that the font and style does not appear to comply with CRC 2.104 and 2.105, i.e. essentially equivalent to Courier, Times New Roman or Arial in size 12 points. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
